nasb.text: then the priest shall calculate for him the amount of your valuation up to the year of jubilee; and he shall on that day give your valuation as holy to the Lord.

esv.text: then the priest shall calculate the amount of the valuation for it up to the year of jubilee, and the man shall give the valuation on that day as a holy gift to the Lord.

cnv.text: 祭司就要按照你的估價，給他計算，直到禧年為止；價值多少，他必須當天付給你估定的價銀，表示把那地獻給耶和華為聖。

ccb.text: 祭司就要按照距下个禧年的年数来估价。那人要当天付清地价，地价归耶和华。
